logic_ema_desc: The bot uses two Exponential Moving Averages (EMA):
opposite_signal: In case of opposite signal, the bot reverses position.
ai_confidence: The bot calculates a Confidence Score. It trades only if confidence > 65%.
app_desc: Multi-asset algorithmic trading platform (Crypto, Stocks, Forex, Commodities) with adaptive, self-learning AI. Test, Alpaca Paper and real Alpaca account modes.
edu_only: ✦ In real-account mode (ALrt) orders use real money. Trading involves the risk of capital loss.
tip_deposit: Add funds to your wallet via PayPal
tip_forex: Forex market open Mon-Fri. Data via Finnhub.
tip_commodity: Commodities open Mon-Fri. Data via Finnhub.
need_finnhub: ⚠️ For Simulated or Real trading you must enter the API Keys in the Broker configuration screens.
notif_finnhub_missing: ⚠️ Non-crypto categories active but Finnhub API key is missing. Data unavailable.
history_cleared: History cleared. Waiting for new signals...
api_modal_desc: To receive real-time data for Stocks, Forex and Commodities, enter a free Finnhub API key.
api_step1: Go to finnhub.io/register and create a free account.
api_step2: Copy your API Key from the dashboard.
alpaca_modal_desc: Connect your Alpaca Paper account (virtual money, real markets).
alpaca_modal_warn: * Orders will be executed on Alpaca's real market (or sandbox).
alpaca_modal_register: No keys yet? Sign up at alpaca.markets and generate your API keys in the Paper Trading section.
tip_tp: Take Profit: trade closed automatically in profit
tip_sl: Stop Loss: trade closed to limit losses
tip_signal: Signal: trade opened/closed based on bot signals
tip_manual: Manual: trade managed directly by the user
tip_broker_sync: Broker Sync: trade synced directly from your Alpaca account
tip_long: Long: buy position (profits if the price rises)
tip_short: Short: short sale (profits if the price falls)
tip_crypto: Crypto: market open 24/7. Real-time data via WebSocket.
tip_logout: Sign out of the Google account
tip_radar_scan: Real-time scan of ALL markets (Crypto, Stocks, Forex, Commodities).
tip_radar_global: The radar monitors all global markets simultaneously
tip_session_roi: Percentage return of the current session compared to the previous close.
tip_equity: Total account value (Cash + Market Value of positions). This is the real value of your portfolio.
tip_initial_cap: Portfolio value at the start of the session or at the previous day's close.
tip_cash: Cash available in the account for new orders or withdrawals.
tip_buying_power: Total capital available for trading, including any leverage (Buying Power).
tip_market_value: Current total value of all open positions (Long + Short).
tip_pnl_daily: Total profit or loss generated by the account.
tip_trade_qty: Percentage of operating capital to allocate to each single trade.
tip_take_profit: Profit percentage at which the position is automatically closed.
tip_stop_loss_field: Maximum loss percentage accepted before automatic closing. Set 0 to disable (No-Loss Mode).
tip_session_budget: Limits the total capital the bot can use in this session. Test mode only.
tip_perf_panel: Real-time analysis of operational and financial performance for the current session.
tip_win_rate: Percentage of trades closed in profit out of the total.
tip_gross_profit: Total sum of gains from trades closed in profit only.
tip_gross_loss: Total sum of losses from trades closed at a loss only.
tip_pnl_realized: Net profit or loss from closed positions.
tip_pnl_unrealized: Unrealized gain or loss of positions currently open in the portfolio.
tip_start_bot: Start or pause the automatic trading algorithm
tip_ai_mode: If off, uses EMA crossovers. If on, uses AI analysis (RSI, MACD, BB) for signals.
tip_ai_toggle: Enable/disable artificial intelligence for automatic trading
tip_buy: Opens the asset selected in the box LONG: you profit if the price rises
tip_sell: Opens the asset selected in the box SHORT: you profit if the price falls
tip_open_pos: Assets currently in the portfolio with profit/loss calculated in real time (Unrealized PnL).
tip_history: History of all trades closed in this session
tip_asset_icon: Asset currently displayed on the chart
tip_asset_select: Select the asset to analyze and trade
ai_desc_sentiment: Simulates reading global news. Heavily penalizes trades if it detects market "panic".
ai_desc_lstm: Simulates a short-term stochastic predictive model acting as the final trend filter.
ai_desc_risk: Uses the Kelly Criterion to size trades and the ATR for a dynamic price-chasing Trailing Stop.
ai_desc_rl: Adaptive memory per asset and direction (long/short): gradually penalizes assets with recent losses and rewards profitable ones, decaying over time.
ai_desc_hedging: If a position collapses sharply, it simulates opening an emergency short position to curb losses.
legal_consent: By registering, you declare that you are at least 18 years old (or the legal age) and that you accept our {tos}, the {eula} and our {privacy}.
disclaimer_body: Personal HF MT AI Powered is a simulator for educational purposes only: no real-money transaction is ever executed. Funds are virtual (Test Mode) or Alpaca paper-trading (fictitious). Nothing in this app constitutes financial advice. By continuing you declare that you are at least 18 years old (or the legal age in your country) and that you have read and accepted the documents below.
api_modal_note: ℹ️ Finnhub is an API on REAL stock markets: prices are live exchange prices, but the money here stays VIRTUAL. The default portfolio is set to $1,000.
alpaca_modal_note: ℹ️ API on the REAL stock market with VIRTUAL money. The default virtual portfolio is set by the Alpaca Paper broker.
alpaca_live_modal_desc: REAL trading API — "For individual traders using Alpaca's trading platform" — with a real investment portfolio.
alpaca_live_modal_warn: ⚠️ WARNING: this account trades with REAL MONEY. Every operation can cause actual losses.
alpaca_live_modal_costs: For market-data costs, see the official documentation:
alpaca_live_modal_liability: The maker of Personal HF MT AI Powered accepts no responsibility for any losses incurred while using the app.
alpaca_live_modal_register: No keys yet? Sign up at alpaca.markets and generate your real-account (Live Trading) API keys.
tip_alpaca_live_btn: Configure ALrt (Alpaca Trading API) — REAL trading (real money)
tip_status_alprt: ALrt status (Alpaca Trading API) — REAL trading: green when connected
disclaimer_checkbox: I declare that I am at least 18 years old and I accept the Terms of Service, the License Terms (EULA) and the Privacy Policy.
keys_required_test: Enter API Key and Secret Key to run the test
conn_fail: Connection failed: invalid keys or service unreachable.
alprt_monitor_only: ALrt mode: REAL account synced in read-only. No orders are sent.
paper_keys_required: Configure the Alpaca Paper API Keys to enable this broker.
finnhub_key_required: Configure the Finnhub key to receive data in Test (FH) mode.
bot_skip_nocash: Insufficient Alpaca crypto cash: crypto orders paused until funds return.
bot_skip_shortcrypto: SHORT signals on crypto skipped: Alpaca only allows LONG on crypto.
engine_paused: Bot PAUSED — press ON for automatic trading (the broker selector does not start the bot)
login_platform: Multi-asset algorithmic trading platform · Adaptive, self-learning AI
login_instruction: Multi-asset trading (Crypto, Stocks, Forex, Commodities) on Test, Alpaca Paper, and Live accounts. Login with Google to open the dashboard and start the session.
login_consent_text: I declare I am over 18, operating from a supported Country, and accept the
onb_desc: To receive market data (Radar and chart) and to trade, you need at least one broker. Configure them in order — you can also connect just one.
onb_fh_cats: US Stocks · Forex · Commodities — live data, paper money
paypal_subtitle: Top up your Personal HF MT AI Powered account
onb_enter_btn: Configure at least one broker to continue
bot_order_rejected: Order {sym} rejected by the broker: retrying in a few minutes.
bot_skip_blacklist: {sym}: structural spread too high, entry skipped by the bot.
bot_skip_maxpos: Open positions limit reached ({open}/{max}): no new orders until one closes.
bot_skip_min10: Insufficient funds ({amount}$). All orders paused for 5 minutes.
bot_skip_nocash_crypto: Insufficient Alpaca crypto cash: orders paused for 5 minutes.
bot_skip_qty: Amount per trade too low for {sym} (stock SHORT requires ≥ 1 whole share). Increase the amount per trade.
bot_skip_shortnotsupported: SHORT ignored: Alpaca account does not allow short selling. Use "LONG only".
bot_skip_spread: Spread {sym} {pct}% above the limit ({cap}%): entry skipped.
bot_skip_spread_unknown: Spread {sym} not yet available: entry skipped for safety.
alrt_keys_required: Enter your REAL Alpaca (Live) keys to operate in real-account mode.
alrt_cancelled: Real-account activation cancelled: keeping the previous selection.
alrt_live_trading: 🔴 ALrt mode active: REAL account. Orders will use real money.
sort_newest_first: Order: newest to oldest (click to invert)
sort_oldest_first: Order: oldest to newest (click to invert)
tip_trailing_sl: Trailing Stop: closed in profit after a price reversal
tip_breakeven: Break-even: closed flat after retracing from profit
tip_hedge: Protection: emergency close after a drop beyond the safety threshold
tip_export_history: Export the full history to a CSV file
tip_export_open: Export open positions to a CSV file
tip_export_orders: Export pending orders to a CSV file
tip_fee_est: Estimated round-trip fee + spread (not a broker-confirmed value)
tip_skipped: Signals the bot generated but could NOT execute, with the reason
tip_deposited_total: Total capital loaded into THIS broker portfolio since opening (cumulative deposits).
tip_current_capital: Current capital = deposits − losses + profits over the ENTIRE history of the selected broker.
tip_pnl_commissions: Total value of all commissions / spreads paid.
tip_pnl_net: Total PnL including the value of closed positions minus commissions.
tip_winning_trades: Total number of trades closed in profit.
tip_losing_trades: Total number of trades closed at a loss.
tip_breakeven_trades: Total number of trades closed at break-even ($0.00).
tip_commissions: Calculated sum of commissions paid to the broker.
tip_manual_qty: Number of asset units for the manual order. Empty = use the automatic amount.
tip_bot_arm_fh: Bot on Finnhub (Test): ON = trades in the background too
tip_bot_arm_alp: Bot on Alpaca Paper: ON = armed (trades when its tab is active)
tip_bot_arm_alrt: Bot on REAL Alpaca: ON = armed (trades when its tab is active)
tip_bot_arm_capd: Bot on Capital.com Demo: ON = trades in the background too
tip_bot_arm_capl: Bot on Capital.com Trading (REAL): ON = armed
